master_status: ACTIVE — INFERENCE RESTORED, NOVAURA-OPS BUILT, DEPLOY PIPELINE FIXED
last_session_summary: Restored all AI inference keys to functions/.env, fixed Claude model ID to claude-opus-4-7, built Novaura-Ops internal Tauri desktop app from scratch, wired OpenRouter as primary inference gateway with free→paid fallback, built OpenRouter Key Management admin panel, fixed build-combined.ps1 (removed dead _redirects, fixed step counter, added deploy prompt), fixed npm cache to Z drive.

work_log.action: Restored functions/.env and fixed inference pipeline
work_log.reason: All AI providers were showing offline. functions/.env had been overwritten with blanks. Restored all keys from .env.backup and merged new OpenRouter inference key. Fixed Claude model ID (was 'claude-4.6', now 'claude-opus-4-7'). Added QWEN_API_KEY (70M tokens).

work_log.action: Built Novaura-Ops internal Tauri v1 desktop app
work_log.reason: Internal staff ops tool — voice conferencing (WebRTC + Firebase RTDB), company chat, AI orchestrator (OpenRouter/Claude/Gemini/Kimi), live code editor (Monaco), admin panel, system metrics, task assignments. Staff-gated via @novaura.xyz Google auth. Aura + Nova onboarding sprites.

Manager key (sk-or-v1-57bd...) used to provision/revoke/limit API keys per staff member and customer subscription tier. Rust backend module + Admin Panel Keys tab with usage bars, create/revoke UI, tier credit reference.

work_log.action: Fixed npm cache path and installed firebase-tools
work_log.reason: npm was pointing cache at F:\Cache\npm (no write permission). Fixed .npmrc to use Z:\npm-cache. Installed firebase-tools globally.

Script had wrong step counter (1/5 → 2/4), dead _redirects file (Netlify syntax, ignored by Firebase), and no deploy step. Fixed counters, removed _redirects, added interactive deploy prompt with optional functions deploy.

work_log.action: Fixed MD linting errors in YOUCOM_API_REFERENCE.md
work_log.reason: Resolved formatting issues (MD022, MD032, MD009, MD031, MD058, MD060) to maintain documentation standards.

work_log.action: Repo recovery, secret stripping, GitHub sync, and partner onboarding doc
work_log.reason: GitHub repo appeared missing — diagnosed as 3-week push gap. Stripped firebase-adminsdk JSON files from git tracking. Consolidated all pending commits and pushed clean. Created PARTNER_ONBOARDING.md.
Populated formerly empty About pages with Origin Story and Ecosystem Directory. Added AboutWindow to OS.

work_log.action: Standardized Avatar component and audited Revenue Pipeline
work_log.reason: Extracted Avatar logic to src/components/avatar/Avatar.jsx. Verified backend Stripe/Royalty logic exists but needs production tuning.

work_log.action: Command Palette V2 expansion and AI integration
work_log.reason: Enabled global Cmd+K functionality with 60+ app registry and AI intent support.
